creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems it can't fetch all distfiles:

=> etcd-io-etcd-v3.5.0_GH0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /portdistfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://codeload.github.com/etcd-io/etcd/tar.gz/v3.5.0?dummy=/etcd-io-etcd-v3.5.0_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: 4020010: No such file or directory
fetch: 4020010: No such file or directory
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/etcd-io/etcd/tar.gz/v3.5.0?dummy=/etcd-io-etcd-v3.5.0_GH0.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: https://codeload.github.com/etcd-io/etcd/tar.gz/v3.5.0?dummy=/etcd-io-etcd-v3.5.0_GH0.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
etcd-io-etcd-v3.5.0_GH0.tar.gz                        3925 kB   10 MBps    01s
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/etcd-io-etcd-v3.5.0_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: 4020010: No such file or directory
fetch: 4020010: No such file or directory
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /portdistfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Can you reproduce this?
